divergences.claim: defaultPageSize() returns 50. List endpoints page results into fixed pages of 50 items unless an explicit pageSize is passed, so a result set of N items spans ceil(N / 50) pages and offsets advance in steps of 50.
divergences.prose: defaultPageSize() returns 50. List endpoints page results into fixed pages of 50 items unless an explicit pageSize is passed, so a result set of N items spans ceil(N / 50) pages and offsets advance in steps of 50.
